tasks.subject: Task 0: GetSessionWithMessages service method
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `memory.Service.GetSessionWithMessages(userID, sessionID, fromEpoch)` returning session metadata + messages with the same user-scope error semantics as SessionExtract.

**Files:**
- Modify: `internal/memory/service.go`
- Create: `internal/memory/service_test.go` (3 subtests: happy path, missing, wrong-user)

**Verify:** `cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay-memory-pivot && CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 ./internal/memory/ -run TestGetSessionWithMessages -v`

**Acceptance:** missing session and wrong-user session both return identical `session not found` error (no existence leak).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/memory/service.go", "internal/memory/service_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay-memory-pivot && CGO_ENABLED=1 go test -tags sqlite_fts5 ./internal/memory/ -run TestGetSessionWithMessages -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GetSessionWithMessages returns session + messages", "missing session → session not found", "wrong user → identical session not found (no leak)", "happy path returns ordered messages"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Plumbing + landing page (/memory)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire `memory.Service` into `web.Handlers`. Add `/memory` landing page with stats and 5 recent sessions teaser. Add Memory link to nav.

**Files:**
- Modify: `internal/web/handlers.go` (Handlers struct + NewHandlers signature + RegisterRoutes + template registration)
- Modify: `internal/web/templates/layout.html` (add Memory nav link, always-visible)
- Modify: `internal/server/http.go` (Server.memSvc field; pass to NewHandlers)
- Modify: `cmd/arc-relay/main.go` (pass memSvc to server.New if signature changes)
- Create: `internal/web/memory_dashboard.go` (HandleMemoryIndex + helpers)
- Create: `internal/web/memory_dashboard_test.go` (test stub — manual verify for now)
- Create: `internal/web/templates/memory.html`

**Verify:** `make test && make build`. Manual: open /memory in browser, see stats card + recent-sessions teaser + RESEARCH ONLY banner.

**Acceptance:** GET /memory renders 200 with stats and teaser. Nav link visible. No admin gating.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/web/handlers.go", "internal/web/templates/layout.html", "internal/server/http.go", "cmd/arc-relay/main.go", "internal/web/memory_dashboard.go", "internal/web/memory_dashboard_test.go", "internal/web/templates/memory.html"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay-memory-pivot && make test && make build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Handlers gains memSvc field", "NewHandlers signature gains memSvc param", "/memory route registered behind requireAuth", "Memory nav link visible (no admin gating)", "page renders 200 with stats + teaser", "banner present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Sessions list page (/memory/sessions)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add /memory/sessions page rendering the user's 50 most-recent sessions in a table, each linking to detail.

**Files:**
- Modify: `internal/web/memory_dashboard.go` (HandleMemorySessions)
- Modify: `internal/web/handlers.go` (template registration + route)
- Create: `internal/web/templates/memory_sessions.html`

**Verify:** `make test && make build`. Manual: navigate to /memory/sessions in browser.

**Acceptance:** GET /memory/sessions renders 200; user A sees only user A's sessions; rows link to /memory/sessions/{id}.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/web/memory_dashboard.go", "internal/web/handlers.go", "internal/web/templates/memory_sessions.html"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay-memory-pivot && make test && make build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET /memory/sessions renders 200", "table shows user-scoped sessions", "rows link to /memory/sessions/{id}", "banner present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Session detail page (/memory/sessions/{id})
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add session detail page with full transcript rendering. 404 on missing/wrong-user.

**Files:**
- Modify: `internal/web/memory_dashboard.go` (HandleMemorySessionDetail)
- Modify: `internal/web/handlers.go` (template registration + /memory/sessions/ route — trailing slash for catch-all)
- Create: `internal/web/templates/memory_session_detail.html`

**Verify:** `make test && make build`. Manual: visit /memory/sessions/{some-id} for own session (200); visit /memory/sessions/does-not-exist (404).

**Acceptance:** missing-session returns 404; other-user session returns 404 (existence-leak prevention); valid session renders full transcript with role labels and RESEARCH ONLY banner.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/web/memory_dashboard.go", "internal/web/handlers.go", "internal/web/templates/memory_session_detail.html"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay-memory-pivot && make test && make build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET /memory/sessions/{valid} renders 200 with transcript", "missing session → 404", "other-user session → 404 (no leak)", "banner present", "messages role-labeled and timestamped"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Search page (/memory/search)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add /memory/search page with form-submit GET. Empty q renders just form. Non-empty q renders ranked results.

**Files:**
- Modify: `internal/web/memory_dashboard.go` (HandleMemorySearch)
- Modify: `internal/web/handlers.go` (template registration + /memory/search route)
- Create: `internal/web/templates/memory_search.html`

**Verify:** `make test && make build`. Manual: search for 'arc-relay' (unquoted hyphen) and confirm hits via the FTS5/regex fallback already in service.

**Acceptance:** form renders without query; with q= renders ranked results with snippets + session links + score; user-scoped.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/web/memory_dashboard.go", "internal/web/handlers.go", "internal/web/templates/memory_search.html"], "verifyCommand": "cd /Users/ian/code/arc-relay-memory-pivot && make test && make build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET /memory/search renders form", "GET /memory/search?q=foo renders results", "each hit links to session detail", "hyphenated queries work (uses service's FTS5/regex fallback)", "banner present", "user-scoped"]}
```
